meaning: adj.未被恳求的,主动提供的
examples: She's always full of unsolicited advice.
The unsolicited ads appear prominently on the screen and are a pet peeve for many users.
Unsolicited advice is perceived as annoying. Don't do it.
Women in the age of AnneMarieSlaughterSherylSandbergMarissaMayer are drowning in a sea of unsolicited advice.
At age 12, he reportedly created a disturbance in the classroom with his unsolicited singing.
